chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 59 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 2917/2025. 2. For orders on CMA 2259/2025. 09.12.2025. Mr. Rajab Ali, Advocate for applicant. Miss Maria Bughio, Advocate for respondent. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Applicant Khalil Ahmed and the attorney of respondent, Mst. Khushnood Bano (her husband) Yahya Khan, are present in Court and jointly submit through Counsel, that they have compromised this matter and no longer wish to proceed with this Civil Revision. Accordingly, this Revision stands dismissed. Parties are at liberty to approach the 5th Additional District Judge, Hyderabad in Summary Suit No.127/2024 to record such compromise, if any, as per law, which matter will be decided on its own merits, as presumably according to counsel the Summary Suit is still pending hearing. The Revision Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
